description: Assign a specified group name to subcontacts to form rock bridges according the specified persistence (between 0 and 1) and the specified length. The proportion of subcontacts assigned the specified group name is approximately equal to 1 - f. For example, if f = 0.7, then 30% of subcontacts will be assigned the group name specified with the bridge-group keyword. the group will be assigned to approximately circular patches of subcontacts with a diameter equal to the specified dimension given with the length keyword. The rock bridges are not perfectly circular to provide some realistic randomness to the system. See example below.

keywords.name: bridge-group
keywords.description: Assign group name s1 (in, optionally, slot s2 ) to a percentage of subcontacts approximately equal to 1 - f1

keywords.name: length
keywords.description: Assign a size to the patches of subcontacts that form rock bridges. Rock bridges will be approximately circular with a diameter of fl

figure_reference.note: This command embeds reference figures that are not captured in this text corpus. Figures are PNGs under <doc-root>/_images/ (doc-root sits beside the engine install, e.g. C:/Program Files/Itasca/<product>/exe64/doc); read them directly.
